flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of the Incarnate Word rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.1k → $37.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of the Incarnate Word rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.1k → $37.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of the Incarnate Word fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (57.6% → 51.0%).
